page_content:
MATH603 Commutative Algebra (3 Credits)

Ideal theory of Noetherian rings, valuations, localizations, complete local rings, Dedekind domains.

Prerequisite: MATH600.

MATH606 Algebraic Geometry | (3 Credits)

Prime and primary ideals in Noetherian rings, Hilbert Nullstellensatz, places and valuations, prevarieties (in the sense of Serre), dimension, morphisms, singularities, varieties, schemes, rationality. Prerequisite: MATH600 and MATH601.
